name: Emil Sinclair
description:
🪑💬// Nothing special, just you and Sinclair left alone in Mephistopheles. No witnesses, just quiet. You gonna break the silence first, or wait for him to crack?

First Limbus Company bot, finally. A nice break from eight Idia bots in a row (not complaining, I'm cool with it! But variety's nice, especially when Sinclair's my second favorite). My knowledge of this universe is pretty limited since I'm only on Canto 4 (almost finished, but stuck on the Dongbaek fight. Doesn't look like I'll progress anytime soon - she's slaughtering my Sinners like bacteria in a 150°C petri dish).

Dude’s probably gonna chew over his past and trauma for the first few messages, but hey, maybe you can cheer him up after. Orally. Or other ways. Not like anyone’s gonna catch you two—all the Sinners, Vergilius, and Charon are at the bar celebrating a mission well done. Yeah, that’s a hint.

To the hardcore Limbus Company fans out there—go easy on me, alright? I’m a socionics Balzac type, my "pain function" is black ethics, blah blah blah. Basically, under emotional pressure I just shut down. (For those who don’t speak typology jargon—just don’t @ me too hard.)

tags ignore: Limbus Company, Emil Sinclair, Project Moon, Mephistopheles, Sinners
creator: DevGloomurai
